rack-of-lamb-teleculinaria.name: Rack Of Lamb
instructions: Wash the potatoes, place them on a tray, season them with salt and bring them in the oven, preheated at 180oC, for about 40 minutes.

Light a frying pan with half the olive oil and evenly chore the cart until golden. Transfer it to a tray, season with salt, pepper and rosemary leaves and water with the frying pan oil. Also take to the oven for about 30 minutes.
After being arranged, cook the grelos in salted water. Drain them and sauté them in a frying pan with the rest of the oil and the cloves of chopped garlic.

Give the potatoes a light blow and put them on a platter as well as the grelos. Cut the cart into pieces, separating them by the bone, and put on the potatoes and the grells. Water with the roast sauce and serve.

radish-salad.name: Radish Salad
instructions: Thinly slice half of radishes on a mandoline and place in a large bowl. Leave remaining radishes whole if small, or slice in half or into wedges if larger and place in same bowl. Season well with kosher salt and squeeze and scrunch radishes several times with your hands to work salt into flesh. Squeeze lemon halves to get 3 Tbsp. juice; save one half for zesting later. Add lemon juice to bowl and finely grate half of cheese over radishes; toss well to coat. Using a fork, crumble remaining cheese into bowl. Add basil and 2 Tbsp. oil and toss again. Taste and season with more kosher salt if needed.
Transfer salad to a platter. Drizzle with more oil, sprinkle with sea salt and pepper, and finely grate zest from reserved lemon over.

raisin-loaf.name: Raisin Loaf

ingredients.item: Bread flour (about 14 ounces) plus more for surface and dusting

instructions: Place raisins and currants in a medium bowl; add 1 1/2 cups hot water. Cover and let soak overnight. Drain, reserving 1/2 cup soaking liquid.

Pour 1 cup warm water (105°1-15°) into a small bowl. Sprinkle yeast over; let stand until dissolved, about 10 minutes. Place 2 3/4 cups flour and 2 Tbsp. butter in the bowl of a stand mixer with a dough hook attached. Mix on medium speed until butter is blended, about 2 minutes. Add yeast mixture and reserved soaking liquid from raisins and currants; beat on low speed for 4 minutes. Add raisins, currants, and salt; mix for 5 minutes.

Transfer dough to a floured work surface (dough will be very soft). Form into a ball, adding just enough flour (about 2-4 Tbsp.) to prevent dough from sticking to your hands. Transfer to a bowl; dust top with additional flour, cover with a kitchen towel, and refrigerate for 1 hour.
Transfer dough to work surface; shape into a ball. Return to bowl, sprinkle with flour, and let rise in a warm, draft-free area until doubled in size, about 3 hours.

Butter two 8x4x2" metal loaf pans. Transfer dough to work surface. Divide dough in half. Form each half into a loaf shape and place in a prepared pan. Dust dough with flour, cover with kitchen towels, and let rise until dough reaches tops of pans, about 2 hours.

Place one rack on bottom shelf of oven and another on middle shelf; preheat to 400°. Add water to an 8x8x2" metal pan to a depth of 1"; place on bottom rack. Bake bread on middle rack for 40 minutes. Carefully remove pan with water. Remove bread from pans. Lay loaves on sides on a baking sheet; bake 5 minutes. Turn loaves onto other side; bake 5 minutes. Turn right side up and bake until done, about 5 minutes. Let cool completely on a wire rack.

ramp-mayonnaise.name: Ramp Mayonnaise
instructions: Combine egg yolks and egg in the bowl a food processor; pulse until blended. Slowly pour in light olive oil and extra virgin olive oil, with the processor running, until mixture becomes thick and creamy; add lemon juice, Dijon mustard, and salt.
Transfer mayonnaise to a small bowl; stir in ramps. Transfer mayonnaise to a jar with a lid; cover and refrigerate until ready to use.

raspberry-mini-cheesecake-lezzet.name: Raspberry Mini Cheesecake

ingredients.item: 3 tablespoons of fine drawn fed  k

instructions: 1. Frambuaz and 1 tablespoon of sugar cook to the pot and until soften and crushed.
2. Take the pot and cool the mixture.
3. Paste Biscumeal push by crushing.
4. Add and mix the butter.
5. Share the Blend to muffin moulds 1 cm thick and share push with spoon & straight.
6. Cool in refrigerator.
7. Labne cheese, cream cheese, vanilla and sugar mixer
8. Add the egg and continue to rub.
9. Add and mix Frambuaz porridge and flour.
10. Bake the mixture of biscuits of uniform uto share push to kissed 180 degree oven for 20 minutes.
11. Cheesecake's hungry cover of the oven; and wait for the interior of the oven until it turns to room heat.
12. Wait for 1 night in refrigerator.
12. August Ç Serve with cream, mint leaves and frambuaz.

raspberry-shrub.name: Raspberry Shrub
instructions: Stir simple syrup, raspberry vinegar, and brandy (optional) in a 12-ounce glass. Fill glass halfway with ice. Fill glass with sparkling water or Prosecco. Garnish with a lemon slice and a mint sprig.

ravioli-of-paros-argiro.name: Ravioli Of Paros

ingredients.item: 1 pinch of mastic beaten (2 tears of mastic)
1 pinch of mastic beaten (2 tears of mastic)

instructions: In a bowl, add the fresh myzithra, honey, cinnamon, grated toast and eggs and knead them all together well until they are combined.

real-pumpkin-spice-latte.name: Real Pumpkin Spice Latte

ingredients.prep: steamed milk, and ground cinnamon (for serving)

instructions: Combine cinnamon sticks, ginger, cloves, and 1½ cups water in a medium saucepan. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat and cook, whisking occasionally, until most of the liquid has evaporated, about 10 minutes. Whisk in pumpkin purée, condensed milk, cream, syrup, and salt and cook, whisking frequently, until mixture is thick and pudding-like in consistency, about 5 minutes. Whisk in vanilla and nutmeg, then strain mixture through a fine-mesh sieve, pressing on solids with a spatula to release as much liquid as possible, into a large bowl.

For each latte, stir together 2–4 Tbsp. pumpkin spice purée (depending how sweet you’d like it) and 1½ oz. hot espresso in your favorite mug. Top with steamed milk and a little bit of freshly grated cinnamon.

recipe-for-baked-stuffed-eggplants-comed.name: Recipe For Baked Stuffed Eggplants
recipe-for-baked-stuffed-eggplants-comed.original_name: Receta de berenjenas rellenas al horno

ingredients.item: 100 gr de queso mozzarella en rebanadas
250 gr de carne picada de ternera
Aceite vegetal de sabor neutro (girasol, canola...)
1 cucharadita cafetera de romero en polvo

instructions: Vamos a comenzar por precalentar el horno a 180 grados.
Mientras esperamos a que se caliente, vamos a poner a punto las berenjenas. Hay que dejarles la piel, cortarlas a la mitad a lo largo, y eliminar la parte de la rama que les queda como cabeza.

Once we have been cut from the half of eggplant, we will make some small cuts at crosses or grid onto the pulp at the centre of every half. & nbsp; We will cut them up as we do about pumpkins in our stuffed pumpkins recipe. We'll do this with a knife's end.
Luego meteremos los trozos de berenjena en remojo, en un recipiente con agua, durante unos diez minutos.
As long as the eggplants are soaked, we can use them to start preparing the pilling. The onion should be peeled and cut into small cubes.
We will also peel garlic teeth and cut them into very small pieces, or shredded them.

The other ingredient we'll have to use to mince is Red Pimento. He's got to be clear. We will remove the seeds, the inner white parts and what remains from the stem, and mingle them into small cubes. Then we'll have all the minced vegetables booked.
Pasados los 10 minutos, vamos a sacar las berenjenas del agua, para luego escurrirlas muy bien.
Once we have been drained, we will put the half of eggplants into a baking plate or bowl and cover them with an oil jet, as S, that will have to form many curves about each's pulp.
Then our eggplants will go to the oven for 20 minutes.

Out of the oven and at the same time we will continue to work with the eggplants. We're going to heat up a frying pan with a tablespoon of oil and there, at medium heat, we're going to cook the garlic and onion pieces, till the last ones start to become transparent.
Enseguida vamos a incorporar los trozos de pimiento rojo y la carne molida. Vamos a dejarlos cocinar de 12 a 15 minutos, revolviendo con frecuencia.

At the time of added meat and minced pepper to frying pan, the time of cooking of eggplants may have been passed. We're going to get them out of the oven and proceed with care for the next step, because they're going to be hot.

With the help of long cover and cuts we had previously put into our pulp, we will withdraw the centre from it. We have to leave only the pulp closest to the skin, and above all care to avoid damage to the skin. That's how we get some kind of eggplant cups to fill up.

When the eggplant's hot and baked, the previous step should give no complication. On the contrary, the pulp should be tipped out with a great deal of ease, even with the help of a kitchen spoon. Once this part has been removed, we will mingle it into small pieces and put it into the frying pan where the meat is cooked.
Now we will get to add the rosemary, the oregano, as well as salt and pepper to suit this pilling mixture. We have to do something good.
After the 15 minutes of cooking of the meat, we will have a part with a tablespoon and use it to fill up an "eggplant cups." The process should be repeated until all half of them have been filled.
Then we will distribute mozzarella slices to cover the halves, and end up by adding the grated cheese to equal parts, setting up a bay leaf between the cheese, for every piece of eggplant.

It's time to get back the bowl or tray with the eggplants into the oven, now to gratify them. We will do this at 200 degrees Celsius, for 10 minutes (15 minutes, if necessary to well melt the cheese).

recipe-for-onions-stuffed-with-feta-chee.name: Recipe For Onions Stuffed With Feta Cheese And Black Olives
recipe-for-onions-stuffed-with-feta-chee.original_name: Receta de cebollas rellenas de queso feta y aceitunas negras

1 cda of frosted bread (optional for more crispy texture)

instructions: It purifies the oven at 180 and 3. Peel onions and cut them slightly at the top. With a small spoon or knife, empty the centre of each onion, leaving an outside cape about 1 cm thick. Save your extracted pulp for pilling.
Put the onions onto a baking plate, scrape them with some olive oil and bake them for 15 minutes to soften them slightly.

He finely pics his pulp from his onions and pits with his Feta cheese, his black olives, his minced garlic, his oregano, his lemon juice and some black pepper. If you wish, add some frosted bread to give more texture.
Take out the onions from the oven and fill them with a mixture of Feta and olives. He's scattering a little more olive oil above.
Replace the onions into the oven and purple for an additional 15- 20 minutes, till the cheese melts slightly and the surface gets a golden tone.
Retira del horno y deja reposar unos minutos antes de servir.

recipe-for-roast-beef-mounts-comedera.name: Recipe For Roast Beef Mounts
recipe-for-roast-beef-mounts-comedera.original_name: Receta de montados de carne asada
instructions: Corta el bistec en cuadritos medianos. Reserva.
Warm a frying pan with oil and add onion. Jumps for 5 minutes.
Vierte una cucharada de la salsa de soya y de la inglesa, mezcla hasta cocinar por 7 minutos. Apaga y reserva.
Warm up another frying pan with some oil and skip the steak for 5 minutes.
Soak the flesh with some salt and pepper. Also add english sauce or soy sauce to cook.
Mezcla y cocina por 10 minutos, apaga y reserva.
Take the flour omelette and add some frying bean, scatter mozzarella cheese and warm up in frying pan.
When the cheese's melted, withdraw from frying pan.
Incorporates a portion of the flesh, quantity is at your best.
Esparce en la tortilla la cebolla, el pepino, el jitomate y el aguacate.
Double and you'll be ready to taste.

recipe-for-smoked-salmon-tacos-comedera.name: Recipe For Smoked Salmon Tacos
recipe-for-smoked-salmon-tacos-comedera.original_name: Receta de tacos con salmón ahumado fáciles

ingredients.item: 120 g smoked salmon in strips or sheets
Minimum salt (salmon already contributes quite a lot)

instructions: Mix the cream cheese with lemon juice, olive oil and a touch of pepper. There's got to be a soft cream that you can put up effortlessly.
It slightly warmes tortillas into a dry frying pan to make them more flexible and prevent them from breaking as they fold them.
Unta una capa fina de crema en el centro de cada tortilla. Esta base ayuda a fijar el relleno y evita que el tomate humedezca demasiado la tortilla.
Add a small minced lettuce bed. Keep the quantity moderate so that the salmon's taste doesn't dominate.
Coloca el tomate en cubos, bien escurrido para mantener la estructura del taco.
Redistribute smoked salmon onto top and leave the sheets loose to give them volume and texture.
It ends with minced dill or parsley and a touch of black pepper. If you want a more fresh profile, add some lemon drops to the salmon.
Sirve en el momento. Si necesitas llevarlos, arma las tortillas justo antes de comer para evitar humedad excesiva.

recipe-for-stuffed-leeks-with-cheese-sau.name: Recipe For Stuffed Leeks With Cheese Sauce
recipe-for-stuffed-leeks-with-cheese-sau.original_name: Receta de puerros rellenos con salsa de queso
instructions: He starts his recipe and puts his four leeks onto an aluminium plate. Fitted with salt and pepper and two tablespoons of olive oil.
Preheat the oven at 180 ° C
Wrap the leeks into the paper and purple for 30 minutes at 180 ° C
Mientras el vegetal se hornea. Coloca en una olla el queso cabra y la nata. Deja cocinar por aproximadamente 10 minutos hasta que se vuelva una crema. Apaga y reposa.
Una vez se hayan horneados los puerros, saca del horno y deja reposar.
Cut half and fill with baked ham.
Serve leeks and baits with cheesebooks. He's with pickle pickles.
Enjoy!

recipe-for-traditional-pico-de-gallo-com.name: Recipe For Traditional Pico De Gallo
recipe-for-traditional-pico-de-gallo-com.original_name: Receta del pico de gallo tradicional

ingredients.item: Sal y pimienta en polvo al gusto

instructions: We'll start by washing all our vegetables well. In the case of a cilantro, I would rather disinfect them after washing them. To achieve this, I put him for five minutes into a bowl with water mixed with a lemon jet.
In the case of onion, we don't have to wash them because we're gonna skin them. After pounding her, we'll cut her into small pits using a sharp knife.
Then we will scold or dry the tomato and cut them into very small cubes.

In the case of a cilantro, we have to scold and then we'll pat the leaves, very finely. No specific measure with respect to the precise quantity of cilantro. That's up to the cook and also to the diners. Nevertheless, from my point of view, a good beak of cello should have abundant cilantro. If you want a reference, you can figure at least half a cup.
To use the chili, remove the other branches, seeds and veins (the internal white parts). Then have him put up very finely, in pieces.

In a bowl, mix up all the vegetables you have just cut. Then, half the lemon or lemons (one or two, depending on the size of the lemons and personal taste), and squeezes the juice onto the beak of the rooster, to season it. He also adds some salt to his taste and optionally a little pepper.
Mix well all the ingredients and then try to check the date. If necessary, fix with more salt.
That's all. Rooster beak's ready to serve.

recipe-for-zucchini-stuffed-with-lentils.name: Recipe For Zucchini Stuffed With Lentils And Carrots
recipe-for-zucchini-stuffed-with-lentils.original_name: Receta de calabacines rellenos de lentejas y zanahorias
instructions: Wash pumpkins and cut them half and long. With a small spoon, empty the centre of pumpkins, creating a kind of barques. Reserve the extracted pulp.
If you have no cooked lentils, cook 1 cup of dry lentils with a pint of salt till they are tender (about 20- 25 minutes). Listen to them and save them.

In a large frying pan, heat olive oil with medium heat. Add onion and garlic and pits till clear. He then incorporates the broken carrot, his pumpkin pulp and his baked lentils. Cooking for about 5- 7 minutes, mixing well.
Add tomato purée, cumin, oregano, salt and pepper to suit. It cooks at low heat for about 10 minutes till flavors are well integrated and the mixture is slightly thick.
It purifies the oven at 180 and 3. Fill pumpkin halves with lentils and carrots. If you wish, sprinkle some grated cheese above.
Put stuffed pumpkins onto a slightly frosted baking plate. Hornea for 20-25 minutes, or until pumpkins are tender and cheese (if you use them) is golden and bubbling.
Retira del horno, deja reposar unos minutos y decora con perejil fresco picado antes de servir.

instructions: Fold the cookies and add the melted butter
Presiona tu pasta de galleta con mantequilla en un molde desmontable previamente engrasado

recipe-to-prepare-divorced-eggs-comedera.name: Recipe To Prepare Divorced Eggs
instructions: Add to a pot with medium heat and with enough water the red tomatoes, the serrane chili, the tree chilies, onion, garlic and salt.

Cooking for 8 minutes or till the tomatoes are well cooked. Once ready, remove the ingredients from the pot and put them to the blender. Loan everything with salt to taste till you get the red sauce. Reserve.

Meanwhile, in another pot with medium heat and with enough water green tomatoes, seawatballs, onion and garlic. Cooking for 8 minutes or until the tomatoes have changed color. Once ready, remove the ingredients from the pot and put them to the blender. Loan everything with salt to taste till you get the green sauce. Reserve.
In a frying pan with medium and hot heat, she dors 2 tortillas on both sides. About 1 minute. That's important. Don't let them get burned. Then remove and let them drain the oil into a napkin.
In a frying pan with high medium heat with enough oil, fry 2 eggs.
Para servir, comienza colocando las tortillas, los huevos sobre cada tortilla.
En uno de los huevos, agrega la salsa verde y la salsa roja en otro huevo, y sirve frijoles refritos en el centro de dos huevos.
Disfruta un plato espectacular y delicioso.

red-broccoli-salad.name: Red Broccoli Salad
instructions: Place bacon in a large skillet. Cook, turning frequently, over medium high heat until evenly browned. Cool, and then crumble.
Preheat oven to 149°C (150 degrees C). Spread slivered almonds on a cookie sheet. Bake for approximately 12 to 14 minutes or until lightly browned, turning once during toasting. Cool.
In a small bowl, mix together mayonnaise, sugar, and vinegar. Set aside.
In a large bowl, combine broccoli, crumbled bacon, celery, green onions, red onions, grapes, and toasted almonds. Toss with mayonnaise dressing. Chill for several hours in the refrigerator.

red-onion-salad-with-pickled-mackerel-an.name: Red Onion Salad With Pickled Mackerel And Sumac
red-onion-salad-with-pickled-mackerel-an.original_name: Uskumru Tour And Red Onion Salad With Sumak
instructions: 1. Place the razor fillet on the glass in the next way.
2. On salt, vinegar, fine chopped garlic, ginger parts and rinsss, turn off over with stretch.
3. Serve after waiting for 3 days in the refrigerator.
4. Crochet red onions for cucumbers.
5. Add 1 teaspoon of salt and tighten thoroughly rub and excess water.
6. You are also fine shore.
7. Add leaves separated mins, vinegar, sum, olive oil.
8. blend all materials and serve the serving plate and serve with mackerel.

red-wine-spaghetti.name: Red Wine Spaghetti
instructions: Combine garlic and 3 Tbsp. oil in a small bowl. Heat a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium; pour in garlic and oil. Add red pepper flakes and 2 Tbsp. butter; cook, stirring occasionally, until garlic is very fragrant but not browned, about 3 minutes. Add wine, increase heat to medium-high, and bring to a boil. Cook, uncovered, until reduced by two-thirds, 20–25 minutes; season with salt. Cover and keep warm.
Meanwhile, cook pasta in a pot of salted boiling water, stirring occasionally, until very al dente, about 3 minutes shy of recommended cook time.

Drain pasta and add to sauce, along with remaining 14 Tbsp. butter. Set pot over medium heat and bring sauce to a simmer. Cook, tossing often, until pasta is well coated and sauce is thickened, about 3 minutes. Taste and season with more salt if needed.
Divide pasta among bowls; drizzle with oil and top with lots of Parmesan.

refreshing-coconut-lime-sorbet.name: Refreshing Coconut Lime Sorbet
instructions: Combine coconut cream, coconut water, lime juice, lime zest, and coconut extract in a bowl. Cover with plastic wrap; chill in the refrigerator until flavors combine, at least 1 hour.
Pour coconut mixture into an ice cream maker and freeze according to manufacturer's instructions. Transfer to an airtight container and freeze until firm, about 1 ½ hours.

refreshing-watermelon-dessert-with-choco.name: Refreshing Watermelon Dessert With Chocolate And Almonds
refreshing-watermelon-dessert-with-choco.original_name: Postre refrescante de sandía con chocolate y almendras
instructions: Wash the watershed well, cut it into triangular portions or cubes of the desired size.
Coloca los 100 g de chocolate con leche en un recipiente resistente al calor.
Fairy to bath, constantly stirring to get a smooth and homogenous blend.
It passes every portion of watermelted chocolate and makes sure you cover only a part so that the presentation will be more attractive.
Immediately after cover with chocolate, sprinkle or bounce the covered part with minced almonds.
place the pieces with chocolate and put them onto a waxed paper and refrigerate the watermelon portions covered for 10-15 minutes or until chocolate solidifies. Enjoy!

rhodes-bun-with-chicken-argiro.name: Rhodes Bun With Chicken
instructions: For the crockery of Rhodes with chicken, boil the chicken with vegetables whole until it softens. We hold the broth and we debon the chicken.
In a wide pot and medium heat, heat the butter to melt. Add the onion and stir. Add Koulouria.
Mix the pasta for 2-3′. Slowly and gradually with a spoon add the Chicken broth by mixing the ingents.
Cucuria begins to grow and a liquid cream is created in the pot. Add the chopped chicken. Salt and pepper.

Finally, to serve Koulouria, heat the butter in a pan to melt. Add the kefalotyri and set aside for 1-2 ́ to melt the cheese. We throw the spruce into the bagels. Mix and serve immediately in deep dishes.
This unique traditional recipe of the Aegean was shared with us by Chef Euripidis Gogos, a member of the Club of Chief Cooks of Dodecanese and Cyclades and we thank him very much.
Rhodes Koulouria you will find in many variations. Sometimes simpler and sometimes more composer.
This traditional Rhodesian recipe of marriage is very rich in taste and very delicious. The process of scraping it makes it unrepeatable.
You can instead use chicken or goat.
Traditionally it is done with goat and is served in all weddings in Rhodes. See the traditional version here.
Koulouria is a traditional pasta from Archangel Rhodes. It is made with whole flour and is pasta without eggs.
See all the recipes shown on the show "The Mothers of the Aegean" here.

rhubarb-collins.name: Rhubarb Collins
instructions: Place rhubarb and brown sugar in a glass; mash with a cocktail muddler until crushed. Add gin to glass; stir to dissolve sugar.
Strain rhubarb mixture into 2 ice-filled Collins or rocks glasses; top with seltzer.

rhubarb-iced-tea.name: Rhubarb Iced Tea
instructions: Bring 4 cups of water to a boil. Add rhubarb, cover, and simmer for 30 minutes. Remove from heat. Stir in tea bags and mint leaves. Cover and let steep for 30 minutes.
Combine sugar and lemon juice in a pitcher. Strain rhubarb and tea mixture over the sugar. Discard the solids.
Using a wooden spoon, stir tea until sugar has dissolved. Add remaining 4 cups of water to the pitcher and stir again. Serve over ice.

rich-hollandaise-sauce.name: Rich Hollandaise Sauce
instructions: Fill a small pot with water to a depth of 2 inches; bring to a simmer over medium heat.

Whisk egg yolks and 1 teaspoon lemon juice in a medium heatproof bowl until well combined and smooth. Set bowl over the simmering water and whisk constantly, moving bowl on and off heat occasionally, until thickened, light yellow, and doubled in volume. The mixture should 'ribbon' slightly when a whisk comes in and out. Remove from heat.

Drizzle melted butter into the egg mixture, a few drops at a time, whisking constantly. Add remaining lemon juice in 2 batches as mixture thickens. Whisk constantly until all butter is incorporated. Whisk in salt and cayenne pepper. Serve immediately.

rigatoni-with-brussels-sprouts-parmesan-.name: Rigatoni With Brussels Sprouts, Parmesan, Lemon, And Leek

ingredients.prep: zest removed with a vegetable peeler, cut into very thin strips

instructions: Trim brussels sprouts with a paring knife, then snap off several dark outer leaves from each; set aside. Cut sprouts into quarters (or halve if very small). Starting at root end, cut half of leek into ½"-thick rings, then chop remaining leek.

Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet over medium. Add brussels sprout quarters and leek rings; season with salt and pepper and cook undisturbed until deep golden brown, about 3 minutes. Toss and continue to cook, tossing occasionally, until browned all over and tender, about 3 minutes more. Transfer to a medium bowl.

Set aside a little lemon zest for serving and add remaining zest along with chopped leek, garlic, and 2 Tbsp. oil to same skillet. Season with salt and pepper and cook, stirring often, until garlic and leek are golden, about 4 minutes. Add wine, bring to a boil, and cook until skillet is almost dry, about 3 minutes.
Meanwhile, cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water until very al dente, 8–10 minutes; drain, reserving 1 cup pasta cooking liquid.

Add pasta to skillet along with reserved brussels sprout leaves, brussels sprout quarters and leek rings, and ½ cup pasta cooking liquid; toss to combine. Bring to a simmer, then gradually add 2 oz. Parmesan, tossing constantly. Cook, shaking skillet to toss pasta and adding more pasta cooking liquid as needed, until pasta is al dente and sauce is thickened and glossy, about 3 minutes. Season with salt and pepper.
Divide pasta among bowls. Top with more Parmesan and pepper and reserved lemon zest; drizzle with oil. Serve with lemon wedges for squeezing over.

riojan-style-potatoes-recipe-comedera.name: Riojan Style Potatoes Recipe
riojan-style-potatoes-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de patatas a la riojana

ingredients.item: 1  guindilla (opcional si quieres un toque picante)

instructions: Peels and pits potatoes into medium pieces, the size of a bite.
Cut the green pepper, choricero pepper and onion into pieces of a size similar to the potato.
In a large pot, where everything's comfortable, adds an olive oil jet and dors over medium heat for a few minutes onion and pepper.
Now put the chorizo, previously cut into cuts of a size similar to potatoes and revoat for another couple of minutes.
Add enough water to cover all ingredients well. Put the choricero pepper and the laurel and the teaspoon of sweet pimenton. If you have decided to wear guindilla, put them up as well.
Now simply let this stew cook with soft fire till the potato's soft.
Echa un poco de sal al gusto pero ten en cuenta que el chorizo puede tener algo de sal.
If you want a more or less bald recipe as you simply check the amount of water, adding more if necessary.
Ya tienes listas tus patatas a la riojana.

roasted-brussels-sprouts.name: Roasted Brussels Sprouts
instructions:
Preheat oven to 450°. Toss brussels sprouts, oil, salt, and pepper on a rimmed baking sheet. Roast, tossing occasionally, until tender and browned, 15-25 minutes for small sprouts, 35–45 minutes for larger sprouts.

Editor’s note: This recipe was originally published in November 2015. Head this way for more of our favorite ways to cook brussels sprouts →

roasted-butternut-squash-souffle.name: Roasted Butternut Squash Soufflé
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper. Lightly butter a 2-quart soufflé or ceramic baking dish; sprinkle 1 tablespoon white sugar over butter, tapping excess sugar out of the dish. Store the prepared dish in the refrigerator.
Place butternut squash, cut-sides down, onto the prepared baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until very soft, 1 to 1 1/2 hours. Allow squash to cool to room temperature.
Sift together flour, baking powder, and salt in a bowl; set aside.

Scrape flesh from butternut squash into a food processor and process until smooth. Add flour mixture, butter, 1/4 cup white sugar, brown sugar, vanilla, cinnamon, and nutmeg; process until smooth. Add egg yolks, one at a time, to squash mixture while continuously processing. Transfer squash mixture to a large bowl.
Beat egg whites in a bowl with an electric mixer until stiff peaks form; fold into squash mixture. Pour mixture into the chilled dish.
Bake in the preheated oven until the top is browned and springs back when gently pressed, about 1 hour.

roasted-cauliflower-with-turmeric-sauce.name: Roasted Cauliflower With Turmeric Sauce

ingredients.item: Store-bought fried onions and toasted unsweetened coconut flakes

instructions: Preheat oven to 425°. Place 1 large head of cauliflower (about 2½ lb.), cored, cut into large florets, on a large rimmed baking sheet. Drizzle with extra-virgin olive oil and season with kosher salt; toss to coat. Spread out into an even layer and roast, turning halfway through, until deeply browned and tender, 40–50 minutes.

Meanwhile, heat 1 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a medium saucepan over medium. Cook 5 garlic cloves, finely grated, and one 2½" piece ginger, peeled, finely grated, stirring constantly, until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Add 2 tsp. ground turmeric and season with salt. Cook, stirring, until mixture is yellow, about 1 minute. Pour in half of one 13.5-oz. can unsweetened coconut milk and bring to a simmer. Cook, stirring occasionally, until slightly thickened, 8–10 minutes. Stir in 1 Tbsp. fish sauce, 2 tsp. honey, and remaining half of one 13.5-oz. can unsweetened coconut milk. Return to a simmer, cover, and cook, stirring occasionally, 20 minutes. Taste sauce and season with more salt and/or add honey if needed.
Transfer cauliflower to a platter; pour turmeric sauce over. Top with 1 Fresno chile, thinly sliced, store-bought fried onions, and toasted unsweetened coconut flakes.

roasted-chicken-legs-with-rosemary-telec.name: Roasted Chicken Legs With Rosemary
roasted-chicken-legs-with-rosemary-telec.original_name: Pernas de frango assadas com alecrim
instructions: Cut the lemon in slices. Have a lemon slice on each chicken leg, add a rosemary splint and attach it with kitchen thread.

Put the chicken on a tray and add the chopped onion into half-moons and garlic. Water with white wine and olive oil and season with sweet pepper, salt and pepper. Let it marinate for 30 minutes, turning it from time to time.
Then add the broth of undone birds and water and bring it to the oven, preheated at 180oC, for 55 minutes, watering from time to time with the sauce itself. Serve hot.

roasted-garlic-parmesan-fingerling-potat.name: Roasted Garlic-parmesan Fingerling Potatoes
instructions: Toss potatoes, garlic, Parmesan cheese, lemon zest, salt, and black pepper together in a bowl. Drizzle with olive oil and toss again until evenly combined.
Heat a cast-iron skillet over medium-high heat. Add butter and heat until melted. Add potatoes; cook and toss until evenly coated with butter, about 2 minutes. Move the skillet to the preheated oven.
Roast in the preheated oven until soft, 15 to 20 minutes, tossing halfway through. Remove from oven and top with parsley.

roasted-grape-crostini-with-fresh-herbs.name: Roasted Grape Crostini With Fresh Herbs

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil and set aside.
Toss grapes, 1 tablespoon olive oil, thyme, and oregano together in a medium bowl. Spread grapes out evenly on the prepared baking sheet and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
Bake in the preheated oven until grapes are tender and their skins start to wrinkle, 12 to 15 minutes.
Meanwhile, brush baguette slices lightly with remaining olive oil and place on another baking sheet.
Toast in the preheated oven until lightly browned, 3 to 4 minutes. Remove grape mixture and crostini from the oven and let cool slightly.
Mix ricotta cheese and lemon zest together in a bowl. Spread onto each crostini and top with grape mixture. Drizzle with balsamic glaze and serve.

roasted-leek-with-pepper-lezzet.name: Roasted Leek With Pepper
instructions: 1. Wash the ends of the crumbs with precise and cold water.
2. Take olive oil into a large pan.
3. Add the cube chopped garlic and nuts and soak in a few minutes high fire.
4. Continue to hang 3-4 minutes by adding fine chopped peppers.
5. Keep cooking 40-45 minutes off the cover in jealous fire, adding sugar, thyme leaves, bay leaf, salt and vegetable juice.
6. Take care of the service plate for the softener.
7. Spread the chopped parsley on it and serve hot or warm.

roasted-squash-with-lemon-tahini-sauce.name: Roasted Squash With Lemon-tahini Sauce

ingredients.item: Kabocha squash or large acorn squash (1 pound)

ingredients.prep: scrubbed, cut into 1-inch-thick wedges or rings, seeded

ingredients.item: Aleppo pepper or crushed red pepper flakes

instructions: Arrange racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat to 425°. Place kabocha on a rimmed baking sheet and delicata on a second sheet. Divide 3 tablespoons oil and 1 1/4 teaspoons cumin between sheets. Season squash with salt and pepper; toss. Roast for 15 minutes.

Combine remaining 1/4 teaspoon cumin, 1 tablespoon oil, and scallions in a small bowl; season with salt and pepper and toss to evenly coat. Scatter scallion mixture over squash, dividing evenly between sheets, and continue to roast until squash is tender but not mushy, about 15 minutes longer (time may vary depending on squash).
Meanwhile, whisk lemon juice, tahini, and 1 tablespoon water in a small bowl to blend. Gradually whisk in remaining 3 tablespoons oil. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
Transfer squash to a platter. Drizzle tahini sauce over and sprinkle with Aleppo pepper.

roasted-tajin-pumpkin-seeds.name: Roasted Tajin Pumpkin Seeds
instructions: Preheat oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Lightly oil a baking sheet.

Bring 6 cups water to a boil in a saucepan: add pumpkin seeds and salt. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes. Strain and pat dry with a paper towel. Spread seeds in a single layer on the prepared baking sheet; sprinkle chili-lime seasoning on top.

Bake in the preheated oven for 10 minutes. Remove from the oven: stir seeds, spread back into a single layer, and return to the hot oven. Repeat twice more, stirring every 10 minutes, until seeds are golden and crisp.

roasted-turkey-sandwich-recipe-with-chee.name: Roasted Turkey Sandwich Recipe With Cheese And Vegetables
roasted-turkey-sandwich-recipe-with-chee.original_name: Receta de sándwich de pavo asado con queso y vegetales

ingredients.item: 4  rebanadas de pan tipo hogaza o pan artesanal
250 g de pechuga de pavo asado (cortado en lonchas gruesas)
4  lonchas de queso suizo (gouda o mozzarella)
A handful of fresh spinach or Roman lettuce leaves
1  cucharadita de mantequilla para tostar el pan

instructions: Unta ligeramente las rebanadas de pan con mantequilla en la cara exterior.
It puts a frying pan or plate with medium heat and dors the bread on the untiled side until crisp and golden.
En la cara interior de cada rebanada, unta mayonesa y, si lo deseas, un poco de mostaza.
Coloca sobre dos rebanadas las lonchas de queso para que se fundan con el calor del pan.
Add the turkey into thick layers, trying to cover the whole surface of the bread.
Incorpora las rodajas de tomate y las hojas de espinaca fresca o lechuga.
Cover with the other slice of bread, press gently and cut the sandwich in half.
It serves hot with tanned pickles.

rockin-oysters-rockefeller.name: Rockin' Oysters Rockefeller
instructions: Clean oysters, and place them in a large stockpot. Pour in beer and enough water to cover oysters; add 2 cloves of garlic, peppercorns, and seasoned salt. Bring to a boil. Remove from heat, drain, and cool.
Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C.)
Once oysters are cooled, break off and discard the top shell. Arrange oysters on a baking sheet.

Melt butter in a saucepan over medium heat. Cook onion and garlic in butter until soft. Reduce heat to low; stir in spinach, Monterey Jack, fontina, and mozzarella. Cook until cheese melts, stirring frequently. Stir in milk; season with salt and pepper. Spoon sauce over each oyster, just filling the shell. Sprinkle with bread crumbs.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden and bubbly, approximately 8 to 10 minutes.

rojoes-a-minho-teleculinaria.name: Rojões To Minho

ingredients.item: -  batatas fritas em cubos para acompanhar

instructions: Lay the rockets in a bowl and season them with olive oil, white wine, pepper paste, blond leaf and garlic teeth. Involve well, cover and let marinate in the fridge for at least 2 hours.
After the time indicated, melt the lard into a pot, add the well-run meat and let it cook in a strong light for about 10 minutes.

Reduce the heat, add the marinade, refine the salt and season with a pinch of pepper. Cover the pot and let it cook for about 35 minutes, or until the sauce is fine and the meat soft. If necessary, add some hot water, but make sure you have little sauce at the end.
Retire do lume, decore com pickles e azeitonas e polvilhe com a salsa picada. Sirva com batatas fritas em cubos.

ronicas-chicken-curry.name: Ronica's Chicken Curry
instructions: Melt the ghee in a large Dutch oven over medium heat. Add the curry leaves, cumin seeds, cinnamon stick pieces, peppercorns, and cloves. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the spices sizzle, the curry leaves crackle, and everything smells warm and fragrant, for 1–2 minutes.

Place the onion, garlic, ginger, and chile in a food processor. Process until very fine and almost paste-like, 2–3 minutes, stopping to scrape down the sides of the bowl as needed. Transfer the mixture to the curry mixture in the Dutch oven. Cook over medium, stirring often, for about 5 minutes, until the mixture thickens, reduces, and turns slightly darker, and you see ghee beginning to separate around the edges.

Stir the chili powder, cumin, coriander, and turmeric into the mixture in the Dutch oven. Cook over medium, stirring constantly, for 1–2 minutes, until the spices bloom and the mixture turns deep red-orange and becomes fragrant.

Pour the tomato puree into the curry mixture in the Dutch oven, and stir well to combine. Cook, stirring occasionally, for 5–7 minutes, until the mixture darkens and thickens slightly and small, slow bubbles form on the surface.

Season the chicken all over with salt to taste. Add the chicken to the curry mixture in the Dutch oven, stirring to coat every piece in the spiced base. Add the coconut milk, the water (it should be enough water to just barely cover the chicken), and the ½ teaspoon salt.

Increase the heat to medium-high, and bring to a steady simmer. Reduce the heat to medium-low, cover the Dutch oven partially, and cook for 15–20 minutes, stirring occasionally, until a thermometer inserted into the chicken registers 74°C  and the sauce is thickened.

Sprinkle the garam masala and fenugreek into the chicken mixture in the Dutch oven. Cook over medium-low heat, stirring, for about 30 seconds, or just until fragrant. Remove from heat. Stir in the lime juice, and taste for seasoning, adding more salt or lime to taste, or a splash of water to adjust thickness if needed.
Garnish with cilantro, and serve with basmati rice and roti.
Enjoy!
